info.name: JobNest API
info.description: Complete JobNest Laravel API collection grouped by module. Uses collection variables for auth tokens and resource IDs. Translatable content endpoints accept `source_language` (`en` or `ar`) and localized responses resolve from `Accept-Language` or `?lang=`.

exec: pm.test('JSON response has no unhandled exception signature', function () {
pm.test('Status code is valid for method', function () {

request.description: Creates a person account and stores access/refresh tokens.

formdata.value: Backend developer with 3 years of experience.

request.description: Populate verification variables from a real signed URL before running this request.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Recruitment Lead",
  "phone": "01022223333",
  "company_name": "JobNest Labs",
  "website": "https://jobnest.test",
  "company_size": "201-500",
  "industry": "HR Tech",
  "location": "Cairo",
  "about": "We build hiring products."
}

item.name: List Skills
item.description: Returns localized skill names using the current API language.

item.name: Create Skill
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted name.

item.name: Show Skill
item.description: Returns the skill name in the selected API language.

item.name: Update Skill
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted name.

item.name: Delete Skill
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table.

item.name: List Languages
item.description: Returns localized language names using the current API language.

item.name: Create Language
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted name.

item.name: Show Language
item.description: Returns the language name in the selected API language.

item.name: Update Language
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted name.

item.name: Delete Language
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table.

item.name: List Interests
item.description: Returns localized interest names using the current API language.

item.name: Create Interest
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted name.

item.name: Show Interest
item.description: Returns the interest name in the selected API language.

item.name: Update Interest
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted name.

item.name: Delete Interest
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table.

item.name: List Jobs
item.description: Returns localized job fields using the `Accept-Language` value.

item.name: Create Job
item.description: Creates bilingual stored job content from a single-language payload. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted text.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Backend Engineer",
  "description": "Build and maintain APIs.",
  "location": "Cairo",
  "employment_type": "full_time",
  "salary_min": 8000,
  "salary_max": 12000,
  "currency": "EGP",
  "experience_level": "mid",
  "requirements": "Laravel and MySQL.",
  "responsibilities": "Own the API lifecycle.",
  "deadline": "2026-05-30",
  "status": "active",
  "skill_ids": [
    "{{skill_id}}"
  ],
  "source_language": "{{api_language}}"
}

item.name: Show Job
item.description: Returns translated job content in the selected API language.

item.name: Update Job
item.description: Updates translated job fields. `source_language` should match the language of the submitted content.

item.name: Apply To Job
item.description: Stores the cover letter bilingually and returns only one localized value in later responses.

item.name: List Chatbot Conversations
item.description: Lists stored chatbot conversations for the authenticated user.

item.name: Create or Reuse Chatbot Conversation
item.description: Creates a stored chatbot conversation or returns the existing one for the authenticated user.

item.name: Send Chatbot Message
item.description: Stores the user message, sends recent chatbot history to the external AI service, and stores the assistant reply.

item.name: Send Text Message
item.description: Stores text messages bilingually using `source_language` and returns localized message bodies in later reads.

item.name: List Categories
item.description: Uses the `lang` query parameter example to resolve one-language category responses.

item.name: Show Category
item.description: Returns the category name and description in the selected API language.

item.name: Create Category
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted category content.

item.name: Update Category
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted category content.

item.name: Delete Category
item.description: Admin-only. Requires an authenticated user whose email exists in the active admins table.

item.name: List Courses
item.description: Returns localized course content according to `Accept-Language`.

item.name: Create Course
item.description: Creates bilingual stored course content from a single-language payload. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted text fields.

item.name: Show Course
item.description: Returns translated course fields in the selected API language.

item.name: Update Course
item.description: Updates translated course content. `source_language` should match the language of the submitted text.

item.name: List Course Reviews
item.description: Returns localized review comments based on the selected API language.

item.name: Create Course Review
item.description: Stores the review comment bilingually from the submitted `source_language`.

item.name: Update Course Review
item.description: Updates the localized review comment and regenerates the missing counterpart language.

item.name: List Service Requests
item.description: Returns localized service-request content according to `Accept-Language`.

item.name: Create Service Request
item.description: Creates bilingual stored request content from a single-language payload. Set `source_language` to the language of the submitted text.

body.raw:
{
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "title": "Build a landing page",
  "description": "Need a responsive landing page for a product launch.",
  "budget_min": 1500,
  "budget_max": 3000,
  "currency": "EGP",
  "location": "Cairo",
  "delivery_mode": "online",
  "deadline": "2026-05-20",
  "skill_ids": [
    "{{skill_id}}"
  ],
  "source_language": "{{api_language}}"
}

item.name: Show Service Request
item.description: Returns translated request fields in the selected API language.

item.name: Update Service Request
item.description: Updates translated request content. `source_language` should match the language of the submitted text.

item.name: Create Service Proposal
item.description: Stores the proposal message bilingually from the submitted `source_language`.

exec: var value = json.data && json.data.data && json.data.data[0] && json.data.data[0].id;
